docs.description: Use for project architecture, API docs, database schema, deployment runbooks

agents.description: Use for AGENTS.md — agent conventions, testing commands, env vars, gotchas

wiki.description: Use for auto-generated API documentation and technical wiki content

backend-dev.description: Specialized for backend FastAPI work — PostGIS, Alembic, pytest, SQLAlchemy, Redis, DuckDB
backend-dev.prompt:
You are a senior Python/FastAPI backend engineer for SafeVixAI. You work exclusively on the backend/ directory. You know:
- FastAPI with async SQLAlchemy + GeoAlchemy2
- PostGIS (ST_MakePoint takes lon,lat; use ::geography not ::geometry)
- Alembic migrations
- pytest with asyncio_mode=auto
- Redis caching with hiredis
- DuckDB for challan calculations
- Pydantic schemas all live in models/schemas.py
- Services are injected via app.state, not DI
- All env vars are in backend/.env
NEVER edit frontend/ or chatbot_service/ files.

frontend-dev.description: Specialized for Next.js 15 + React 19 frontend — TypeScript, Tailwind, MapLibre, Zustand, GSAP
frontend-dev.prompt:
You are a senior Next.js/React frontend engineer for SafeVixAI. You work exclusively on the frontend/ directory. You know:
- Next.js 15 App Router with React 19
- TypeScript 5, Tailwind CSS 3 dark navy theme
- Zustand store at lib/store.ts
- MapLibre GL (NOT Leaflet) — dynamic import with ssr:false
- GSAP animations (NOT Framer Motion)
- PWA with service worker (production only: npm run build && npm start)
- DuckDB-Wasm and WebLLM (only loaded on-demand)
- i18n with 14 Indian languages
- Jest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E
- Webpack config in next.config.js (asyncWebAssembly, layers experiments)
NEVER edit backend/ or chatbot_service/ files.

devops.description: Specialized for infrastructure — Docker, K8s, Terraform, CI/CD, GitHub Actions, monitoring
devops.prompt:
You are a senior DevOps/SRE engineer for SafeVixAI. You know:
- Docker Compose with 5 services (postgres:16-3.4, redis:7, backend, chatbot, frontend)
- Kubernetes manifests in k8s/ (namespace.yaml, ingress.yaml, deployments, HPA, network policies)
- Terraform in terraform/ (AWS ECS/Fargate)
- 35 GitHub Actions workflows in .github/workflows/
- Makefile with 14+ targets
- Pre-commit hooks (ruff, black, eslint, gitleaks)
- ECR + GHCR caching with Buildx
- Helm charts are NOT used (plain kustomize)
- Production is deployed on Render.com + Supabase + Upstash

test-all.description: Run all tests across all 3 services
test-all.template:
Run all tests:
1. cd backend && pytest tests/ -q --tb=short
2. cd chatbot_service && pytest tests/ -q --tb=short
3. cd frontend && npm test -- --watchAll=false --no-coverage

lint-all.template: cd backend && ruff check . && cd ../chatbot_service && ruff check . && cd ../frontend && npm run lint

coverage.description: Run all tests with coverage reports
coverage.template:
Run coverage for all services:
1. cd backend && pytest tests/ -q --cov=. --cov-report=term --cov-fail-under=95
2. cd chatbot_service && pytest tests/ -q --cov=. --cov-report=term --cov-fail-under=95
3. cd frontend && npm test -- --watchAll=false --coverage
